working_on: Routine task P5-05: Political philosophy seed — eighth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; single-task (not pre-split) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. Apply via Supabase MCP chunked execute_sql + apply_migration marker; verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-05 and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0100_seed_political_philosophy_part1.sql with ~28 nodes across four clusters (foundation [1]: political_philosophy; theories of justice [8]: justice, distributive_justice, justice_as_fairness, libertarianism_political, communitarianism, capability_approach, luck_egalitarianism, desert_theory_political; state/authority/legitimacy [6]: state_political, sovereignty, political_authority, political_legitimacy, social_contract_theory, political_obligation; liberty/equality/rights [7]: liberty_political, equality_political, human_rights, natural_rights, positive_rights, negative_rights, toleration; government and ideologies [6]: democracy, liberalism, republicanism, conservatism, socialism, multiculturalism). Plus ~34 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges (umbrella → clusters; cluster → canonical anchors; canonical anchors → derivative positions). Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so the live graph audit engages.
